title: DDACS Teaser
subtitle: Deep Drawing and Cutting Simulations (DDACS) Dataset
description:
A 22 MB sample of the DDACS dataset: one full FEM simulation of a two stage sheet metal stamping process (deep drawing in OP10, trimming with elastic recovery in OP20), the Croissant 1.1 manifest, the process parameter table for all 32,466 simulations, and the dataset documentation PDF.

The full release (32,466 simulations, roughly 640 GB of lossless HDF5, with a predefined 25,973 / 3,246 / 3,247 train, validation and test split) is hosted on DaRUS with a citable DOI: https://doi.org/10.18419/DARUS-4801

Quickstart:

    pip install ddacs
    import ddacs
    ds = ddacs.load(data_dir='data')

Runnable tutorials are in the Code tab. Docs: https://ddacs.readthedocs.io  Package: https://pypi.org/project/ddacs  Source: https://github.com/BaumSebastian/DDACS

License: data CC BY 4.0, code MIT. Please cite the dataset DOI and the paper (10.1051/matecconf/202540801090).

resources.description: Overview, quickstart, and links to the full dataset, docs, and package.
Full dataset documentation: geometry parameters, the HDF5 field reference, and the process description.

Croissant 1.1 manifest: the machine readable schema (every HDF5 field and CSV column) that ddacs.load and mlcroissant consume. Its contentUrls point to DaRUS, so tools can fetch the full data on demand.
One complete simulation (id 258864): OP10 deep drawing and OP20 trimming with elastic recovery, all components (blank, binder, die, punch), across timesteps.
The 8 input parameters plus split metadata for all 32,466 simulations.

fields.name: index
fields.description: Unique simulation identifier; matches the HDF5 filename (e.g. 16039 to 16039.h5).

fields.name: geometry
fields.description: Base part geometry: rectangular, concave, or convex.

fields.name: curvature_radius
fields.description: Geometry specific curvature / corner radius, in mm.

fields.name: bottom_radius
fields.description: Bottom radius of the formed cup, in mm.

fields.name: wall_angle
fields.description: Wall angle of the formed cup, in degrees.

fields.name: material_scaling_factor
fields.description: Scaling factor on the base DP600 flow curve (1.0 is nominal). Dimensionless.

fields.name: sheet_metal_thickness
fields.description: Initial blank sheet thickness (SHTK), in mm.

fields.name: friction_coefficient
fields.description: Coulomb friction coefficient between blank and tools (FC). Dimensionless.

fields.name: blankholder_force
fields.description: Force applied by the blank holder (BF), in Newtons.

fields.name: split
fields.description: Recommended ML split: train (~80%), test (~10%), val (~10%); deterministic.

fields.name: rddac
fields.description: True if the simulation belongs to the RDDAC sub study.
